zh.La Roche-Derrien, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagn: 法國布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫拉 洛-德利
zh.Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France: 法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉維特雷
zh.lifeSummary: 當Guy X de Laval於大約1300年出生在法國麥延賴伐爾時，他的父親Guy IX de Laval de Montmorency33歲，母親Beatrice de Gavre21歲。他於大約1316年與Beatrix de Bretagne在法國布列塔尼結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1347年6月18日在法國布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫拉 洛-德利享年48歲，埋葬在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉維特雷。

zh-hans.La Roche-Derrien, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagn: 法国布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫拉 洛-德利
zh-hans.Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France: 法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉維特雷
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guy X de Laval于大约1300年出生在法国麥延賴伐爾时，他的父亲Guy IX de Laval de Montmorency33岁，母亲Beatrice de Gavre21岁。他于大约1316年与Beatrix de Bretagne在法国布列塔尼结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1347年6月18日在法国布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫拉 洛-德利享年48岁，埋葬在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉維特雷。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Laval
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, Old French val (originally feminine, later masculine; see Val , compare Lavallee ), or a habitational name from Laval, the name of several places in various parts of France, ultimately derived from Latin vallis ‘valley’.

variants.name: Val
meanings: Spanish: variant of Valle , from val, a variant of valle ‘valley’. Compare Delval .
Galician and Portuguese: topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, val (compare 3 below). Compare also Doval .

French and Haitian: topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, (Old) French val (originally feminine, later masculine; compare Vallee ), from Latin vallis (feminine). Compare Duval and Laval .

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

en.lifeSummary: When Guy X de Laval was born about 1300, in Laval, Mayenne, France, his father, Guy IX de Laval de Montmorency, was 33 and his mother, Beatrice de Gavre, was 21. He married Beatrix de Bretagne about 1316, in Brittany, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 18 June 1347, in La Roche-Derrien, Côtes-d'Armor, Brittany, France, at the age of 48, and was buried in Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guy X de Laval est né environ 1300, à Laval, Mayenne, France, son père, Guy IX de Laval de Montmorency, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Beatrice de Gavre, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Beatrix de Bretagne environ 1316, à Bretagne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 18 juin 1347, à La Roche-Derrien, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guy X de Laval um 1300 in Laval, Mayenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guy IX de Laval de Montmorency 33 und seine Mutter Beatrice de Gavre 21. Er hat um 1316 in Bretagne, Frankreich Beatrix de Bretagne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 18. Juni 1347 im Alter von 48 Jahren in La Roche-Derrien, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Frankreich und wurde in Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guy X de Laval è nato il circa 1300 nel Laval, Mayenne, Francia, il suo padre, Guy IX de Laval de Montmorency, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Beatrice de Gavre, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Beatrix de Bretagne circa 1316, nel Bretagne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 18 giugno 1347, nel La Roche-Derrien, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia.

ja.La Roche-Derrien, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagn: フランスブレタグンクoテス-ド'アルモーラ ロチェ-デリーン
ja.Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France: フランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインヴィトルe
ja.lifeSummary: Guy X de Lavalが約1300年にフランスメイエンラヴァルで生まれた時，父Guy IX de Laval de Montmorencyは33歳，母Beatrice de Gavreは21歳であった。約1316年にフランスブレタグンでBeatrix de Bretagneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1347年6月18日にフランスブレタグンクoテス-ド'アルモーラ ロチェ-デリーンで48歳で死去し，フランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインヴィトルeにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guy X de Laval(이)가 대략 1300년 프랑스 메이니 라발에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guy IX de Laval de Montmorency(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice de Gavre(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1316년 프랑스 브레타그니에서 Beatrix de Bretagne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1347년 6월 18일 프랑스 브레타그니 co츠-드'아모르 라 록헤-더리에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 비트e에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guy X de Laval nasceu aproximadamente 1300, em Laval, Mayenne, França, seu pai, Guy IX de Laval de Montmorency, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice de Gavre, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrix de Bretagne aproximadamente 1316, em Bretagne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 18 de junho de 1347, em La Roche-Derrien, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, França, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guy X de Laval родился около 1300 г. в местности лаваль, меиенн, Франция, его отцу по имени Guy IX de Laval de Montmorency было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Beatrice de Gavre, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrix de Bretagne около 1316 г. в местности бретагн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 18 июня 1347 г. в местности ла роше-дирриен, кoтес-д'армор, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности витрe, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guy X de Laval nació aproximadamente 1300, en Laval, Mayenne, Francia, su papá, Guy IX de Laval de Montmorency, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Beatrice de Gavre, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Beatrix de Bretagne aproximadamente 1316, en Bretagne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 18 de junio de 1347, en La Roche-Derrien, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia.
